title: Fix inout port lowering for sv.verbatim.module
body: https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9131/ was recently merged but does not correctly handle `firrtl.extmodule`s with inout ports. This implements the [same logic used in `HWModuleOp`](https://github.com/tmckay-sifive/circt/blob/a387bee4f809f57f25f55d606c2b29fd7f9d5aea/lib/Dialect/HW/HWOps.cpp#L757) in the lowering for `sv.verbatim.module`.
